mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wx_group_info ( room_id, corp_id, create_user_id, total, notice_sendervid, flag, create_time, notice_content, nickname, new_flag, notice_time, managers ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{corpId}, #{createUserId}, #{total}, #{noticeSendervid}, #{flag}, #{createTime}, #{noticeContent}, #{nickname}, #{newFlag}, #{noticeTime}, #{managers} )
mapper.update: UPDATE wx_group_info SET room_id = #{roomId}, corp_id = #{corpId}, create_user_id = #{createUserId}, total = #{total}, notice_sendervid = #{noticeSendervid}, flag = #{flag}, create_time = #{createTime}, notice_content = #{noticeContent}, nickname = #{nickname}, new_flag = #{newFlag}, notice_time = #{noticeTime}, managers = #{managers} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO wx_group_info ( room_id, corp_id, create_user_id, total, notice_sendervid, flag, create_time, notice_content, nickname, new_flag, notice_time, managers ) VALUES
( #{item.roomId}, #{item.corpId}, #{item.createUserId}, #{item.total}, #{item.noticeSendervid}, #{item.flag}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.noticeContent}, #{item.nickname}, #{item.newFlag}, #{item.noticeTime}, #{item.managers} )
